title: NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture Notes
text: NVIDIA Blackwell pairs next generation GPUs with NVLink, high-bandwidth memory, and improved transformer engine support. For AI training economics, Blackwell focuses on cluster throughput, networking efficiency, and lower energy per token.

title: AMD MI300 Training Economics
text: AMD MI300 combines CPU and GPU chiplets with HBM in an accelerator package. The competitive question versus NVIDIA Blackwell is software maturity, networking scale, memory capacity, and total cost for AI training workloads.

title: TSMC CoWoS Capacity for AI Accelerators
text: TSMC CoWoS advanced packaging capacity constrains supply for AI accelerators from NVIDIA, AMD, and other semiconductor customers. Packaging bottlenecks affect shipment timing and gross margin leverage.

title: DRAM Memory Pricing Cycle
text: DRAM and NAND pricing recovered as cloud demand improved. Memory suppliers benefit from tighter wafer starts, but this note does not analyze AI accelerator architecture.
